title: Widen skeleton: `waystation brief --task <id>`
description: Implement the core feature: a task-scoped brief that gives an agent only the context it needs (spec §10). Assemble goal, acceptance criteria, status, scope rules, applicable prompts, dependencies, open issues, recent handoffs, relevant decisions, and next action — while excluding unrelated tasks and full history.
acceptance: `waystation brief --task <id>` returns the task goal, acceptance criteria, status, scope rules, selected prompts, dependencies, and open risks/next action.
The brief excludes unrelated tasks, closed issues (unless requested), and full event history.
Brief budget values (small/medium/large/full) are accepted; the smallest still includes goal, blockers, and next action.
bun:test covers scoped inclusion/exclusion for at least one task.
notes: This is the heart of Waystation — agents read briefs instead of the whole ledger. Depends on read commands (data access) and validation (trustworthy references).
